title: Latvian MPs comment on Evika Siliņa's resignation
summary_full: Prime Minister Evika Siliņa’s (New Unity) resignation was the right decision, long overdue, and inevitable, according to statements made by representatives of the Saeima factions during a special news broadcast by Latvian Public Media.
